category_sources: source_facts.description says it uploads media folders to Google Photos; official repository describes a command line tool to mass upload media folders to Google Photos accounts.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title is Google Photos uploader CLI; source_facts.name is gphotos-uploader-cli.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official GitHub README points users to the documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/gphotosuploader/gphotos-uploader-cli, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Google Photos media folder upload; official repository topics and README describe CLI upload and Go implementation.
